title: bouteloua purpurea
intro: Bouteloua purpurea, also known as grama grass, is a perennial grass native to North America. Its medicinal properties include being used to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua purpurea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua purpurea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the dried plant in hot water or alcohol.
